title: GEEPAS 2 Slice Toaster | 6 Browning Levels with Cancel Function | For Thin Small Bread Slice, Removable Crumb Tray Cool Touch Housing High Lift | Space-Saving Design | 1 Yr Warranty 650W White
features: ✅ POWERFUL TOASTING IN A COMPACT PACKAGE-Start your mornings right with a powerful 650W 2 slice toaster that delivers perfect toast in minutes. Camping toaster has space-saving design fits even the smallest kitchens. Ideal for flats, dorms, or solo breakfasts.

✅ TOAST IT YOUR WAY – 6 BROWNING LEVELS-Whether you love a golden crunch or a deep crisp finish, find your ideal shade with adjustable browning settings in toasters with 2 wide slots. Customize every slice to your taste. No more settling for burnt or pale toast!

✅ FOR SMALL & THIN SLICES – EASY, SAFE TOASTING WITH NON-SLIP FEET – Say goodbye to poorly toasted pieces! This travel toaster is ideal for small and thin bread slices, delivering precise, even toasting without compromise. Non-slip feet ensure safe and steady use every time.

✅ SAFE & SIMPLE HIGH-LIFT LEVER-Retrieve your toast without getting burned thanks to the user-friendly high-lift feature of smart toaster. Even the smallest slices pop up higher for safe removal. Small toaster is great for families and kids learning to toast!

✅ ONE-TOUCH CANCEL FUNCTION – Changed your mind mid-toast? No worries. Simply press the cancel button on the bread toaster to instantly stop the toasting cycle. A quick solution that adds safety, speed, and control to your busy mornings.

✅ COOL-TOUCH BODY & CORD STORAGE FOR SAFE, TIDY USE– With its cool-touch housing, this slim toaster stays safe to handle, even mid-cycle. No more finger burns or worried moments. Perfect for households with kids or pets, and the built-in cord storage keeps your countertop tidy and clutter-free.

✅ SLIDE-OUT CRUMB TRAY FOR EASY CLEANING & AUTO SHUT-OFF – Tired of messy countertops? The slide-out crumb tray in this plastic toaster keeps things clean by collecting stray bits. Plus, the auto shut-off feature adds extra safety and convenience for worry-free toasting every time.

✅ SIMPLE DESIGN & MADE FOR DAILY USE – Built with a clean design this two slice toaster blends easily into any kitchen setup. Lightweight and compact, it's perfect for everyday use, simple to store, and convenient to move when needed.
description: Product Description 2 SLICE BREAD TOASTER With two slice Short-slots, this toaster can handle thin-sliced bread to small breads with ease. REMOVABLE CRUMB TRAY The removable crumb tray makes for easy cleaning. For your safety, the toaster is cool touch, has non-slip feet. CORD STORAGE The integrated cord storage is a neat and tidy solution for your kitchen worktop, concealing any excess cord in the base. VARIABLE BROWNING CONTROL With a variable browning control with 6 settings, you can set the toaster so that you get your perfect coloured toast every time or alternatively. EVEN AND FAST TOASTING It will pop up on its own after finish toasting, the easy way to prepare breakfast. Combining modern design with practical performance, this 650W 2 slice toaster makes a great addition to any home.
